name: Dark Luxe
author: akellainmotion
description: Dark backgrounds, gold accents, serif headings, premium and sophisticated

componentOverrides.button: bg-amber-600/90 text-white rounded border border-amber-500/50 font-light tracking-wider uppercase text-sm px-8 py-3 hover:bg-amber-500 transition-all
componentOverrides.card: bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 rounded p-8 shadow-xl
componentOverrides.input: bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-700 rounded text-white placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus:border-amber-500 px-4 py-3
componentOverrides.badge: border border-amber-500/30 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 rounded text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-3 py-1
componentOverrides.alert: bg-neutral-900 border border-amber-500/30 rounded p-6 text-neutral-200
